# `nise doctor`

- **Usage**: `nise doctor [-J --json] <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Aliases**: `dr`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/doctor/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/doctor/mod.rs)

Check nise installation for possible problems

## Flags

Examples:

